steps.title: Connect the story examples
steps.content: The first sentence says the collection includes multiple stories about romantic relationships. The text then gives one story and moves to another similar story.

steps.title: Choose a parallel transition
steps.content: A would introduce a concession, B would make the second story an example of the first story instead of another related example, and D would signal a result. The matching transition adds a similar case. The answer is C.
